title: armeria macloviana subsp. californica
intro: Armeria macloviana subsp. californica, commonly known as the California sea thrift, is a subspecies of the Armeria macloviana plant, which is a flowering plant in the gentian family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Armeria macloviana subsp. californica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medicinal use.
